macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Fed Chair Powell Delivers Speech Amid Key US Economic Data Releases
items.summary: Fed Chair Powell spoke at 02:30 PM UTC following releases of Dallas Fed Manufacturing Index (-0.2 vs. 0.2 expected), Chicago PMI (52.8), and other indicators like ADP Employment (63K) and Retail Sales (-0.2% MoM). These events highlight ongoing monitoring of US labor market and inflation trends.

items.title: Oil Prices Dip on De-escalation News
items.summary: Oil prices declined following reports of de-escalation in geopolitical tensions. This comes amid broader market movements including emerging markets rally.

items.title: Emerging Markets Stocks Surge 5% on US-Iran Developments
items.summary: MSCI emerging markets stock index jumped 5%, marking its biggest daily gain since November 2022, driven by US-Iran news; oil prices dropped 13% while EM bonds rallied amid easing fiscal pressures.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Past $72K on US-Iran Ceasefire News
items.summary: Bitcoin rallied over 4-5% to nearly $72,000 following a two-week ceasefire deal between the US and Iran announced by President Trump, boosting crypto market cap to $2.45-2.52 trillion. Ethereum rose 6-7% to around $2,243-$2,248, with XRP up 5%.

items.title: Crypto Market Cap Jumps 4% Amid Global Risk-On Rally
items.summary: Total crypto market capitalization increased 4% to $2.45 trillion, driven by Middle East ceasefire easing geopolitical tensions and crashing oil prices below $100/barrel. Standout gainers include ZEC (+22%), ICP (+13%), Avalanche (+9.5%), and ORDI (+9.48%).

items.title: Top Crypto Gainers: ORDI Leads with 9.48% Surge
items.summary: ORDI (ORDER) topped 24-hour gainers at +9.48% to $0.0587 with $16.76M volume, followed by MOG (+3.57%), TREE (+3.03%), amid broader market rally from ceasefire news.

items.title: Crypto Fund Inflows Rise $224M, XRP Sees Largest Jump
items.summary: Global crypto fund investments increased by $224 million last week, with XRP leading at $120 million—the largest since mid-December 2025—followed by Bitcoin ($107M) and Solana ($35M); Ethereum saw $53M outflows.

items.title: Bitcoin Active Addresses Hit Lowest Since 2013
items.summary: Bitcoin network daily active addresses dropped to the lowest level since autumn 2013, negatively impacting transaction fees and mining profitability despite price surge.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI Model Uncovers Thousands of Zero-Day Vulnerabilities
items.summary: Anthropic's new Claude Mythos preview model has identified thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities in every major operating system and web browser, prompting Project Glasswing—a partnership with big tech to proactively patch these critical bugs before wider release.

items.title: DARPA Launches MATHBAC Program for AI Agent-to-Agent Communication
items.summary: DARPA announced the Mathematics of Boosting Agentic Communication (MATHBAC) program, offering up to $2 million in grants to develop foundational math and protocols for AI agents to collaborate on scientific discoveries and hypothesis generation.

items.title: Intel Joins Elon Musk's $25 Billion Terafab AI Chip Project
items.summary: Intel has partnered with Elon Musk's Terafab project, aimed at producing AI chips to power humanoid robots and data centers, marking a significant collaboration in AI hardware development.

items.title: Anthropic Reaches $30 Billion Run Rate Amid Enterprise AI Demand
items.summary: Anthropic reports accelerating enterprise demand for its AI models, achieving a $30 billion annual run rate as companies rush to adopt advanced AI solutions.

items.title: FBI Reports $893 Million in Losses from AI-Driven Scams
items.summary: The FBI has flagged over $893 million in financial losses attributed to AI-powered scams, highlighting growing risks in the AI era.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 Delayed to May 2026
items.summary: Rockstar Games has delayed Grand Theft Auto VI to May 26, 2026, delivering the anticipated but dreaded news to fans awaiting the massive open-world title.

items.title: Nintendo Takes Legal Action Against Alleged Switch 2 Leaker
items.summary: Nintendo is suing accessory maker Genki for allegedly misleading consumers and leaking Switch 2 information.

items.title: Elder Scrolls: Oblivion Remake Officially Confirmed
items.summary: Bethesda has confirmed the Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion remake with a cryptic teaser, with a possible surprise reveal date coming soon; players are already glitching out of the map in the remastered version.

items.title: New Wheel of Time AAA RPG Announced
items.summary: A full-fledged AAA video game adaptation of The Wheel of Time is announced by a studio behind the hit live-action series, potentially rivaling Game of Thrones games.

items.title: Nioh 3 Announced with Immediate Playable Demo
items.summary: Team Ninja and Koei Tecmo announce Nioh 3 during Sony’s State of Play, allowing soulslike fans to play a demo right now on PS5; full release set for 2026.

items.title: Star Fox New Game Announcement Leaked for This Month
items.summary: Prominent leaker NateTheHate claims a new classic-style Star Fox game will be announced this month via Nintendo, fueled by the character's appearance in the Super Mario Galaxy Movie.

items.title: Bloodstained Sequel The Scarlet Engagement Revealed
items.summary: Developer ArtPlay unveils The Scarlet Engagement, a new entry in the Bloodstained series that diverges significantly from the original, shown at June PlayStation State of Play.

items.title: Final Fantasy Tactics Remaster and Other Big Reveals at State of Play
items.summary: June 2025's PlayStation State of Play features major announcements including Final Fantasy Tactics remaster launching in September, Metal Gear Solid, Digimon, Silent Hill f release date, and more.

items.title: Double Dragon and River City Creator Yoshihisa Kishimoto Passes Away
items.summary: Yoshihisa Kishimoto, creator of Double Dragon and River City series, has passed away, as reported in a fresh Game Informer article.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
